## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation
Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed API
```python
# Example of how you'd like to use it
from cvfiq.SomeModule import SomeClass

detector = SomeClass(param=value)
result = detector.doSomething(img)
```

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references here.
